query:
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'projects', COUNT(*) FROM projects
UNION ALL SELECT 'questionnaire_answers_v3', COUNT(*) FROM questionnaire_answers_v3
UNION ALL SELECT 'questionnaire_progress_v3', COUNT(*) FROM questionnaire_progress_v3
UNION ALL SELECT 'clients', COUNT(*) FROM clients
UNION ALL SELECT 'tasks', COUNT(*) FROM tasks
UNION ALL SELECT 'task_history', COUNT(*) FROM task_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'project_annotations', COUNT(*) FROM project_annotations
UNION ALL SELECT 'onboarding_tour_progress', COUNT(*) FROM onboarding_tour_progress;
